description: Read the tag array from an ESE leaf page
steps: Construct a synthetic ESE page buffer with a known tag count in the page header
Call EsePage::tags() to retrieve all tag offsets and lengths
Verify tag count matches the header value
Verify first tag offset and length match encoded values

description: Extract record data slice for a given tag index
steps: Construct a synthetic page with two tags pointing to known data
Verify each slice matches the encoded bytes

description: Tag access beyond tag count returns Err
